MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AXEL STRAUSS DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT

Defendant Axel Strauss demurs to Jane Doe's causes of action against him (the First, Second, and Sixth Causes of Action) as time-barred. For the reasons stated herein, the court overrules the demurrer.

The court grants both parties' unopposed requests for judicial notice.

Proposed order submitted.

Off Calendar May-09-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2025 Continued To May-14-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: 1-DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CONSERVATORY OF MUSIC'S DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant San Francisco Conservatory of Music's demurrer to the fifth through eighth causes of action in the first amended complaint is sustained with leave to amend as to the fifth through eighth causes of action. Plaintiffs may file a second amended complaint no later than February 21, 2025. Although plaintiffs bring their claims per CCP 340.16(e) (FAC par. 63), they have not had adequately alleged that SFCM "engaged in a cover up or attempted a cover up of a prevous instance or allegations of sexual assault by an alleged perpetrator of such abuse" as required by that subsection. Moreover, the claims alleged by Jane Doe are all based on conduct that occurred before January 1, 2009 and thus, per CCP 340.16(b)(3), are not within the scope of the claims revived by CCP 340.16. Since it is reasonably possible that plaintiffs may be able to allege ultimate facts that remedy these deficiencies, they are given leave to do so, if they can do so in good faith.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must email it to contestdept301tr@sftc.org

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/HK)
